text_preview:
“THE UFO NIGHT IN BRAZIL 1986 – # 1 DOCUMENTS” 18:30.

ARX.0.0.263 part 1

MAY 19th and 20th, 1986. Time: 20:15.

“Report. Day 19 to May 20, 1986.

Time: start 23: 15Z – End: 03: 40Z

At 11:15 pm, OI BR, 3S Daniel received a TF1 call (sector F8) from the ACC-BS [Brasilia-DF Approach Control] informing that the TWR-SJ operator [São José dos Campos Control Tower- SP], was seeing lights (luminous points) near the Aerodrome. We contacted TWR-SJ (TF2 9-276 – CONS – A) and it was confirmed to us by the operator, so we made the predicted questionnaire, which is attached. We contacted APP-São Paulo an
summary: On the night of May 19-20, 1986 (UFOs Night in Brazil), FAB interceptor pilots pursued luminous objects near São José dos Campos and Anápolis, obtaining radar and visual contacts.
